name: Nutty Mincemeat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
2. Sift dry ingredients into a medium-sized bowl.
Make a "well" in the center of the mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, cream butter until smooth.
Add eggs and beat well. Stir in mincemeat and apple juice until combined.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry mixture,
stirring just enough to moisten.
5. Gently fold in chopped walnuts.
6. Grease muffin pans and spoon batter into each cavity, filling about 2/3 full.
7. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of
a muffin comes out clean.
8. Makes 12 muffins.
